hero.slogan: Work permits, residence permits and employer support in Georgia

work-permit.title: Work Permit
work-permit.short: If you are a foreign national, operating as an IE or planning to start work or business in Georgia, we will help you understand whether a work permit is required and how to start the process correctly.
work-permit.description: If you operate as an IE, plan to start work or business in Georgia, intend to get employed, or as an employer want to hire a foreign employee, it is important from the start to understand whether a work permit is required in your case and which procedure to follow. This is where we step in: we analyse your situation, determine the right direction and provide clear steps for a correct start to the process.
work-permit.description2: This service is especially useful if you are uncertain about your status, don't know which documents will be needed, aren't sure where to begin, or have already started the process and want to make sure you are moving in the right direction.
section1: those planning to start activities in Georgia
foreign nationals who intend to work in Georgia
employers who plan to hire a foreign employee
section2: we determine whether a work permit is required specifically in your case
we explain which route fits your type of activity
we review documents and provide a clear checklist
we support you at the start of the process and in further steps
work-permit.section3: If you don't know where to start, which route suits you specifically, which documents are needed and how to organise the process without mistakes from the very beginning, this service helps remove that uncertainty and properly organise the process.
work-permit.ctaText: Contact us for an initial assessment and we will advise which route fits your specific case.

3.title: Status Follow-up
3.desc: We monitor your application and handle any authority requests on your behalf.

residence-permit.title: Residence Permit
residence-permit.short: We help determine the grounds for a residence permit in Georgia, collect the right documents and start the process without unnecessary mistakes or delays.
residence-permit.description: A residence permit in Georgia is not issued simply upon request — it requires a specific legal basis. The most common mistake at the start is choosing the wrong basis, which leads to wasted time, unnecessary documents or a delayed application. We help you understand from the very beginning whether you have a suitable basis, which application route fits your case and how to organise the process correctly.
residence-permit.description2: This service is especially useful if you want to apply for a residence permit based on IE or entrepreneurial activity, employment, real estate, as an IT specialist, through family reunification or on any other legal basis. We analyse your situation, review your documents and help you put together a clear, working application package.
residence-permit.section1Title: When this service is especially relevant

section2: we determine the suitable basis for your application
we explain which route best fits your specific situation
we review documents and provide a clear checklist

we guide you through the next steps after submission
residence-permit.section3: If you are not sure whether you are eligible for a residence permit, don't know which basis to choose, worry about document errors or want to organise the process correctly from the start, we help remove that uncertainty and turn it into a clear working plan.
residence-permit.ctaText: Request an initial assessment and we will advise whether you have a suitable basis for a residence permit and how to best start the process in your case.

employer-support.title: Employer Support
employer-support.short: We help companies build a structured hiring process for foreign employees in Georgia — without confusion, missed deadlines or unnecessary business risk.
employer-support.heroShort: Hiring process, compliance and ongoing support.
employer-support.description: For employers, hiring a foreign national is not just about the hire itself — it means organising the process correctly from the start. In practice, most problems arise at this stage: unclear steps, incorrect sequencing, missed deadlines and the absence of a structured process that does not overload HR, management or operations teams.
employer-support.description2: We help companies turn this into a clear and manageable process. We analyse your specific case, identify the correct procedure, review documents and support you at key stages — so that hiring foreign employees becomes a controlled business process rather than a chaotic task.
section1: when the company plans to hire a foreign employee
when a clear process needs to be built for HR or operations teams
when it is important to avoid missing mandatory steps or deadlines
when there is already confusion, delays or a risk of errors
when renewals, changes or terminations need to be organised correctly
section2: we identify the applicable procedure for your case
we build a clear step-by-step process for the employer

employer-support.section3: This service is designed for businesses that do not want to proceed by trial and error. If you need a clear structure, deadline control, the right sequence of actions and confidence that hiring a foreign employee is organised correctly — we will help eliminate uncertainty and build a reliable working system.
employer-support.ctaText: Leave a consultation request and we will outline the right process for your case.

about.label: About Us
about.body1: Founded in 2014, Stay & Work Georgia has been providing professional support to foreign nationals, entrepreneurs, employers and companies navigating work permits, residence permits, Individual Entrepreneur (IE) registration and business setup in Georgia.
about.body2: Trusted by both individuals and businesses, we manage each case with a structured, step-by-step approach — from initial assessment and document preparation to filing guidance, coordination and follow-up. Our work is defined by clear communication, careful preparation, confidentiality and reliable support tailored to the specific needs of each client.

footer.description: We help foreign nationals navigate work permits, residence permits and business setup in Georgia.

footer.disclaimer: Professional consultancy services. We are not a law firm.
